revision.comment: 新鮮な真新しいページ
revision.text:
{{神社 |名称 = 行神社 |画像 = [[File:Yuki shrine.JPG|280px]]
行神社 正面から |所在地 = 宮城県黒川郡富谷町志戸田字塩竈15 | 緯度度 = 38 |緯度分 = 25 |緯度秒 = 45.23 | 経度度 = 140 |経度分 = 53 |経度秒 = 16.96 |祭神 = 猿田彦命 (配祀)崇徳天皇 (合祀)大物主命 磐長姫命 |神体 = |社格 = [[延喜式神名帳|式内社]] |創建 = 1700年頃の説あり |本殿 = 本殿流造銅板葺 |別名 = 行神社志波大明神（江戸時代） |札所等 = |例祭 = 4月第１日曜日 春季例祭 |神事 = }} '''行神社'''（ゆきじんじゃ）は、[[宮城県]][[黒川郡]][[富谷町]]志戸田にある[[延喜式神名帳|延喜式内社]]である{{cite web|url=http://www.town.tomiya.miyagi.jp/html/shuyu/index3.html|title=富谷町/富谷集遊|publisher=富谷町|accessdate=2015-03-09}}。 ==概要== 富谷町の北部には[[水田]]が広がっており、北西側の志戸田地区の[[丘陵]]の東端で、[[国道4号]]線の西側の側道から300mほどの丘の上にある。旧[[陸奥国]]に百座、[[黒川郡]]には四座が祀られている式内社のうちの一社である。[[大嘗祭]]の時には、東西に悠紀殿と主基殿の二殿が特設され祭儀がとり行われる。当社より北の[[大衡村]]に鎮座する須岐神社とを関連付けて意義を考える説もある。境内には樹高約20ｍ、根回り3ｍ余りの杉の木があって、樹齢は700年を超えると推定されている。 ==周辺の神社== * [[鹿嶋天足別神社]] - 黒川郡富谷町大亀字和合田2-16 * [[熊野神社]] - 黒川郡富谷町富谷字町16 * 二ノ宮神社 - 黒川郡富谷町二ノ関字館下92 * [[八幡神社 (大和町)|吉岡八幡神社]] - 黒川郡[[大和町]][[吉岡]]字町裏39 * '''須岐神社''' - 黒川郡大衡村駒場字下宮前4 * [[八幡神社]] - 黒川郡大衡村大衡字八幡48 == アクセス == * [[東北自動車道]][[大和インターチェンジ|大和IC]]から車で10分 * [[仙台北部道路]][[富谷インターチェンジ|富谷IC]]から車で10分 * [[東北自動車道]][[泉インターチェンジ|泉IC]]から車で20分 == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} == 外部リンク == *[http://www.miyagi-jinjacho.or.jp/jinja-search/detail.php?code=310020371 宮城県神社庁] == 関連項目 == * [[宮城県の神社一覧]] * [[別表神社]] * [[近代社格制度]] * [[志戸田用水隧道]] {{デフォルトソート:ゆきしんしや}} {{式内社一覧}} [[category:式内社|*]] [[Category:宮城県の神社|ゆき]] [[Category:神道の文献|神道の文献]] [[category:平安時代]] [[Category:927年の日本]] [[Category:宮城県の建築物]] [[Category:宮城県の観光地]] [[Category:富谷町の歴史]] {{shinto-stub}}

revision.text:
{{神社 |名称 = 行神社 |画像 = [[File:Yuki shrine.JPG|280px]]
行神社 正面から |所在地 = [[宮城県]][[富谷市]]志戸田字塩竈15 | 緯度度 = 38 |緯度分 = 25 |緯度秒 = 45.23 | 経度度 = 140 |経度分 = 53 |経度秒 = 16.96 |祭神 = 猿田彦命 (配祀)崇徳天皇 (合祀)大物主命 磐長姫命 |神体 = |社格 = [[延喜式神名帳|式内社]] |創建 = [[1700年]]頃の説あり |本殿 = 本殿流造銅板葺 |別名 = 行神社志波大明神（江戸時代） |札所等 = |例祭 = 4月第１日曜日 春季例祭 |神事 = |地図 = Japan Miyagi }} '''行神社'''（ゆきじんじゃ）は、[[宮城県]][[富谷市]]志戸田にある[[延喜式神名帳|延喜式内社]]である{{Cite web|和書|url=http://www.town.tomiya.miyagi.jp/html/shuyu/index3.html|title=富谷市/富谷集遊|publisher=富谷市|accessdate=2015-03-09}}。 ==概要== 富谷市の北部には[[水田]]が広がっており、北西側の志戸田地区の[[丘陵]]の東端で、[[国道4号]]線の西側の側道から300mほどの丘の上にある。旧[[陸奥国]]に百座、[[黒川郡]]には四座が祀られている式内社のうちの一社である。[[大嘗祭]]の時には、東西に悠紀殿と主基殿の二殿が特設され祭儀がとり行われる。当社より北の[[大衡村]]に鎮座する須岐神社とを関連付けて意義を考える説もある。境内には樹高約20ｍ、根回り3ｍ余りの杉の木があって、樹齢は700年を超えると推定されている。 ==周辺の神社== * [[鹿島天足別神社]] - 富谷市大亀和合田2-16 * [[熊野神社 (富谷市)]] - 富谷市富谷新町16 * 二ノ宮神社 - 富谷市二ノ関館下92 * [[八幡神社 (大和町)|吉岡八幡神社]] - 黒川郡[[大和町]][[吉岡 (大和町)|吉岡]]字町裏39 * '''須岐神社''' - 黒川郡大衡村駒場字下宮前4 * [[大衡八幡神社]] - 黒川郡大衡村大衡字八幡48 == アクセス == * [[東北自動車道]][[大和インターチェンジ|大和IC]]から車で10分 * [[仙台北部道路]][[富谷インターチェンジ|富谷IC]]から車で10分 * [[東北自動車道]][[泉インターチェンジ|泉IC]]から車で20分 == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == 関連項目 == * [[志戸田用水隧道]] == 外部リンク == *[http://www.miyagi-jinjacho.or.jp/jinja-search/detail.php?code=310020371 宮城県神社庁] {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} {{デフォルトソート:ゆきしんしや}} [[Category:宮城県の神社]] [[Category:富谷市の歴史]] [[Category:陸奥国の式内社]] [[Category:宮城県の旧村社]] [[Category:富谷市の建築物]]

revision.text:
{{神社 |名称 = 行神社 |画像 = [[File:Yuki shrine.JPG|280px]]
社殿 |所在地 = [[宮城県]][[富谷市]]志戸田字塩竈15 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = [[猿田彦命]]、(配祀)[[崇徳天皇]]、(合祀)[[大物主命]]、[[磐長姫命]] |神体 = |社格 = [[延喜式神名帳|式内社]] |創建 = [[1700年]]頃の説あり |本殿 = 本殿流造銅板葺 |別名 = 行神社志波大明神（江戸時代） |札所等 = |例祭 = 4月第１日曜日 春季例祭 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Miyagi|label=行神社|position=top|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''行神社'''（ゆきじんじゃ）は、[[宮城県]][[富谷市]]志戸田にある[[延喜式神名帳|延喜式内社]]である{{Cite web|和書|url=http://www.town.tomiya.miyagi.jp/html/shuyu/index3.html|title=富谷市/富谷集遊|publisher=富谷市|accessdate=2015-03-09}}。 ==概要== 富谷市の北部には[[水田]]が広がっており、北西側の志戸田地区の[[丘陵]]の東端で、[[国道4号]]線の西側の側道から300mほどの丘の上にある。旧[[陸奥国]]に百座、[[黒川郡]]には四座が祀られている式内社のうちの一社である。[[大嘗祭]]の時には、東西に悠紀殿と主基殿の二殿が特設され祭儀がとり行われる。当社より北の[[大衡村]]に鎮座する須岐神社とを関連付けて意義を考える説もある。境内には樹高約20ｍ、根回り3ｍ余りの杉の木があって、樹齢は700年を超えると推定されている。 ==周辺の神社== * [[鹿島天足別神社]] - 富谷市大亀和合田2-16 * [[熊野神社 (富谷市)]] - 富谷市富谷新町16 * 二ノ宮神社 - 富谷市二ノ関館下92 * [[八幡神社 (大和町)|吉岡八幡神社]] - 黒川郡[[大和町]][[吉岡 (大和町)|吉岡]]字町裏39 * '''須岐神社''' - 黒川郡大衡村駒場字下宮前4 * [[大衡八幡神社]] - 黒川郡大衡村大衡字八幡48 == アクセス == * [[東北自動車道]][[大和インターチェンジ|大和IC]]から車で10分 * [[仙台北部道路]][[富谷インターチェンジ|富谷IC]]から車で10分 * [[東北自動車道]][[泉インターチェンジ|泉IC]]から車で20分 == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == 関連項目 == * [[志戸田用水隧道]] == 外部リンク == *[http://www.miyagi-jinjacho.or.jp/jinja-search/detail.php?code=310020371 宮城県神社庁] {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} {{デフォルトソート:ゆきしんしや}} [[Category:宮城県の神社]] [[Category:富谷市の歴史]] [[Category:陸奥国の式内社]] [[Category:宮城県の旧村社]] [[Category:富谷市の建築物]]

{{nihongo|'''Yuki Shrine'''|行神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mutsu Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

{{nihongo|'''Yuki Shrine'''|行神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mutsu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Yuki Shrine'''|行神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mutsu Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

{{nihongo|'''Yuki Shrine'''|行神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mutsu Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

{{nihongo|'''Yuki Shrine'''|行神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mutsu Province]].

{{神社 |名称 = 行神社 |画像 = [[File:Yuki shrine.JPG|270px]]
社殿 |所在地 = [[宮城県]][[富谷市]]志戸田字塩竈15 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = [[猿田彦命]]、(配祀)[[崇徳天皇]]、(合祀)[[大物主命]]、[[磐長姫命]] |神体 = |社格 = [[延喜式神名帳|式内社]] |創建 = [[1700年]]頃の説あり |本殿 = 本殿流造銅板葺 |別名 = 行神社志波大明神（江戸時代） |札所等 = |例祭 = 4月第１日曜日 春季例祭 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Miyagi|label=行神社|position=top|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''行神社'''（ゆきじんじゃ）は、[[宮城県]][[富谷市]]志戸田にある[[延喜式神名帳|延喜式内社]]である{{Cite web|和書|url=http://www.town.tomiya.miyagi.jp/html/shuyu/index3.html|title=富谷市/富谷集遊|publisher=富谷市|accessdate=2015-03-09}}。 ==概要== 富谷市の北部には[[水田]]が広がっており、北西側の志戸田地区の[[丘陵]]の東端で、[[国道4号]]線の西側の側道から300mほどの丘の上にある。旧[[陸奥国]]に百座、[[黒川郡]]には四座が祀られている式内社のうちの一社である。[[大嘗祭]]の時には、東西に悠紀殿と主基殿の二殿が特設され祭儀がとり行われる。当社より北の[[大衡村]]に鎮座する須岐神社とを関連付けて意義を考える説もある。境内には樹高約20ｍ、根回り3ｍ余りの杉の木があって、樹齢は700年を超えると推定されている。 ==周辺の神社== * [[鹿島天足別神社]] - 富谷市大亀和合田2-16 * [[熊野神社 (富谷市)]] - 富谷市富谷新町16 * 二ノ宮神社 - 富谷市二ノ関館下92 * [[八幡神社 (大和町)|吉岡八幡神社]] - 黒川郡[[大和町]][[吉岡 (大和町)|吉岡]]字町裏39 * '''須岐神社''' - 黒川郡大衡村駒場字下宮前4 * [[大衡八幡神社]] - 黒川郡大衡村大衡字八幡48 == アクセス == * [[東北自動車道]][[大和インターチェンジ|大和IC]]から車で10分 * [[仙台北部道路]][[富谷インターチェンジ|富谷IC]]から車で10分 * [[東北自動車道]][[泉インターチェンジ|泉IC]]から車で20分 == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == 関連項目 == * [[志戸田用水隧道]] == 外部リンク == *[http://www.miyagi-jinjacho.or.jp/jinja-search/detail.php?code=310020371 宮城県神社庁] {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} {{デフォルトソート:ゆきしんしや}} [[Category:宮城県の神社]] [[Category:富谷市の歴史]] [[Category:陸奥国の式内社]] [[Category:宮城県の旧村社]] [[Category:富谷市の建築物]]

revision.comment: Immanuelle moved page [[行神社]] to [[Yuki Shrine]] without leaving a redirect: Merging Japanese Wikipedia import with English content

history}}[[Category:Automerged Japanese text]] == Japanese Wikipedia content == {{神社 |名称 = 行神社 |画像 = [[File:Yuki shrine.JPG|270px]]
社殿 |所在地 = [[宮城県]][[富谷市]]志戸田字塩竈15 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = [[猿田彦命]]、(配祀)[[崇徳天皇]]、(合祀)[[大物主命]]、[[磐長姫命]] |神体 = |社格 = [[延喜式神名帳|式内社]] |創建 = [[1700年]]頃の説あり |本殿 = 本殿流造銅板葺 |別名 = 行神社志波大明神（江戸時代） |札所等 = |例祭 = 4月第１日曜日 春季例祭 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Miyagi|label=行神社|position=top|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''行神社'''（ゆきじんじゃ）は、[[宮城県]][[富谷市]]志戸田にある[[延喜式神名帳|延喜式内社]]である{{Cite web|和書|url=http://www.town.tomiya.miyagi.jp/html/shuyu/index3.html|title=富谷市/富谷集遊|publisher=富谷市|accessdate=2015-03-09}}。 ==概要== 富谷市の北部には[[水田]]が広がっており、北西側の志戸田地区の[[丘陵]]の東端で、[[国道4号]]線の西側の側道から300mほどの丘の上にある。旧[[陸奥国]]に百座、[[黒川郡]]には四座が祀られている式内社のうちの一社である。[[大嘗祭]]の時には、東西に悠紀殿と主基殿の二殿が特設され祭儀がとり行われる。当社より北の[[大衡村]]に鎮座する須岐神社とを関連付けて意義を考える説もある。境内には樹高約20ｍ、根回り3ｍ余りの杉の木があって、樹齢は700年を超えると推定されている。 ==周辺の神社== * [[鹿島天足別神社]] - 富谷市大亀和合田2-16 * [[熊野神社 (富谷市)]] - 富谷市富谷新町16 * 二ノ宮神社 - 富谷市二ノ関館下92 * [[八幡神社 (大和町)|吉岡八幡神社]] - 黒川郡[[大和町]][[吉岡 (大和町)|吉岡]]字町裏39 * '''須岐神社''' - 黒川郡大衡村駒場字下宮前4 * [[大衡八幡神社]] - 黒川郡大衡村大衡字八幡48 == アクセス == * [[東北自動車道]][[大和インターチェンジ|大和IC]]から車で10分 * [[仙台北部道路]][[富谷インターチェンジ|富谷IC]]から車で10分 * [[東北自動車道]][[泉インターチェンジ|泉IC]]から車で20分 == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == 関連項目 == * [[志戸田用水隧道]] == 外部リンク == *[http://www.miyagi-jinjacho.or.jp/jinja-search/detail.php?code=310020371 宮城県神社庁] {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} [[Category:宮城県の神社]] [[Category:富谷市の歴史]] [[Category:陸奥国の式内社]] [[Category:宮城県の旧村社]] [[Category:富谷市の建築物]] ==End Japanese==

[[JA:行神社]] {{wikidata link|Q22120773}} [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] {{translated page|ja|行神社|version=107319371|comment=Imported full ja history}}[[Category:Automerged Japanese text]] == Japanese Wikipedia content == {{神社 |名称 = 行神社 |画像 = [[File:Yuki shrine.JPG|270px]]
社殿 |所在地 = [[宮城県]][[富谷市]]志戸田字塩竈15 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = [[猿田彦命]]、(配祀)[[崇徳天皇]]、(合祀)[[大物主命]]、[[磐長姫命]] |神体 = |社格 = [[延喜式神名帳|式内社]] |創建 = [[1700年]]頃の説あり |本殿 = 本殿流造銅板葺 |別名 = 行神社志波大明神（江戸時代） |札所等 = |例祭 = 4月第１日曜日 春季例祭 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Miyagi|label=行神社|position=top|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''行神社'''（ゆきじんじゃ）は、[[宮城県]][[富谷市]]志戸田にある[[延喜式神名帳|延喜式内社]]である{{Cite web|和書|url=http://www.town.tomiya.miyagi.jp/html/shuyu/index3.html|title=富谷市/富谷集遊|publisher=富谷市|accessdate=2015-03-09}}。 ==概要== 富谷市の北部には[[水田]]が広がっており、北西側の志戸田地区の[[丘陵]]の東端で、[[国道4号]]線の西側の側道から300mほどの丘の上にある。旧[[陸奥国]]に百座、[[黒川郡]]には四座が祀られている式内社のうちの一社である。[[大嘗祭]]の時には、東西に悠紀殿と主基殿の二殿が特設され祭儀がとり行われる。当社より北の[[大衡村]]に鎮座する須岐神社とを関連付けて意義を考える説もある。境内には樹高約20ｍ、根回り3ｍ余りの杉の木があって、樹齢は700年を超えると推定されている。 ==周辺の神社== * [[鹿島天足別神社]] - 富谷市大亀和合田2-16 * [[熊野神社 (富谷市)]] - 富谷市富谷新町16 * 二ノ宮神社 - 富谷市二ノ関館下92 * [[八幡神社 (大和町)|吉岡八幡神社]] - 黒川郡[[大和町]][[吉岡 (大和町)|吉岡]]字町裏39 * '''須岐神社''' - 黒川郡大衡村駒場字下宮前4 * [[大衡八幡神社]] - 黒川郡大衡村大衡字八幡48 == アクセス == * [[東北自動車道]][[大和インターチェンジ|大和IC]]から車で10分 * [[仙台北部道路]][[富谷インターチェンジ|富谷IC]]から車で10分 * [[東北自動車道]][[泉インターチェンジ|泉IC]]から車で20分 == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == 関連項目 == * [[志戸田用水隧道]] == 外部リンク == *[http://www.miyagi-jinjacho.or.jp/jinja-search/detail.php?code=310020371 宮城県神社庁] {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} ==End Japanese== [[Category:宮城県の神社]] [[Category:富谷市の歴史]] [[Category:陸奥国の式内社]] [[Category:宮城県の旧村社]] [[Category:富谷市の建築物]]

shrine.JPG|270px]]
社殿 |所在地 = {{jalink|宮城県|Q47896}}{{jalink|富谷市|Q1205173}}志戸田字塩竈15 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|猿田彦命}}、(配祀){{jalink|崇徳天皇|Q349287}}、(合祀){{jalink|大物主命}}、{{jalink|磐長姫命}} |神体 = |社格 = {{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932|式内社}} |創建 = {{jalink|1700年|Q6813}}頃の説あり |本殿 = 本殿流造銅板葺 |別名 = 行神社志波大明神（江戸時代） |札所等 = |例祭 = 4月第１日曜日 春季例祭 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Miyagi|label=行神社|position=top|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''行神社'''（ゆきじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|宮城県|Q47896}}{{jalink|富谷市|Q1205173}}志戸田にある{{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932|延喜式内社}}である{{Cite web|和書|url=http://www.town.tomiya.miyagi.jp/html/shuyu/index3.html|title=富谷市/富谷集遊|publisher=富谷市|accessdate=2015-03-09}}。 ===概要=== 富谷市の北部には{{jalink|水田}}が広がっており、北西側の志戸田地区の{{jalink|丘陵|Q222912}}の東端で、{{jalink|国道4号|Q1055023}}線の西側の側道から300mほどの丘の上にある。旧{{jalink|陸奥国|Q907389}}に百座、{{jalink|黒川郡|Q1131782}}には四座が祀られている式内社のうちの一社である。{{jalink|大嘗祭|Q11433653}}の時には、東西に悠紀殿と主基殿の二殿が特設され祭儀がとり行われる。当社より北の{{jalink|大衡村|Q1204681}}に鎮座する須岐神社とを関連付けて意義を考える説もある。境内には樹高約20ｍ、根回り3ｍ余りの杉の木があって、樹齢は700年を超えると推定されている。 ===周辺の神社=== * {{jalink|鹿島天足別神社|Q20043641}} - 富谷市大亀和合田2-16 * {{jalink|熊野神社 (富谷市)|Q28690106}} - 富谷市富谷新町16 * 二ノ宮神社 - 富谷市二ノ関館下92 * {{jalink|八幡神社 (大和町)|Q22119988|吉岡八幡神社}} - 黒川郡{{jalink|大和町|Q1205377}}{{jalink|吉岡 (大和町)|Q11412777|吉岡}}字町裏39 * '''須岐神社''' - 黒川郡大衡村駒場字下宮前4 * {{jalink|大衡八幡神社|Q11438808}} - 黒川郡大衡村大衡字八幡48 === アクセス === * {{jalink|東北自動車道|Q428428}}{{jalink|大和インターチェンジ|Q10934247|大和IC}}から車で10分 * {{jalink|仙台北部道路|Q11377788}}{{jalink|富谷インターチェンジ|Q16144881|富谷IC}}から車で10分 * {{jalink|東北自動車道|Q428428}}{{jalink|泉インターチェンジ|Q11143029|泉IC}}から車で20分 === 脚注 === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} === 関連項目 === * {{jalink|志戸田用水隧道|Q20044788}} === 外部リンク === *[http://www.miyagi-jinjacho.or.jp/jinja-search/detail.php?code=310020371 宮城県神社庁] {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} {{デフォルトソート:ゆきしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Autogenerated pages with jawiki interwikis, possibly accidentally overwritten]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mutsu Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:宮城県の神社]] [[Category:富谷市の歴史]] [[Category:陸奥国の式内社]] [[Category:宮城県の旧村社]] [[Category:富谷市の建築物]]

社殿 |所在地 = {{jalink|宮城県|Q47896}}{{jalink|富谷市|Q1205173}}志戸田字塩竈15 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|猿田彦命}}、(配祀){{jalink|崇徳天皇|Q349287}}、(合祀){{jalink|大物主命}}、{{jalink|磐長姫命}} |神体 = |社格 = {{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932|式内社}} |創建 = {{jalink|1700年|Q6813}}頃の説あり |本殿 = 本殿流造銅板葺 |別名 = 行神社志波大明神（江戸時代） |札所等 = |例祭 = 4月第１日曜日 春季例祭 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Miyagi|label=行神社|position=top|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''行神社'''（ゆきじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|宮城県|Q47896}}{{jalink|富谷市|Q1205173}}志戸田にある{{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932|延喜式内社}}である{{Cite web|和書|url=http://www.town.tomiya.miyagi.jp/html/shuyu/index3.html|title=富谷市/富谷集遊|publisher=富谷市|accessdate=2015-03-09}}。 ===概要=== 富谷市の北部には{{jalink|水田}}が広がっており、北西側の志戸田地区の{{jalink|丘陵|Q222912}}の東端で、{{jalink|国道4号|Q1055023}}線の西側の側道から300mほどの丘の上にある。旧{{jalink|陸奥国|Q907389}}に百座、{{jalink|黒川郡|Q1131782}}には四座が祀られている式内社のうちの一社である。{{jalink|大嘗祭|Q11433653}}の時には、東西に悠紀殿と主基殿の二殿が特設され祭儀がとり行われる。当社より北の{{jalink|大衡村|Q1204681}}に鎮座する須岐神社とを関連付けて意義を考える説もある。境内には樹高約20ｍ、根回り3ｍ余りの杉の木があって、樹齢は700年を超えると推定されている。 ===周辺の神社=== * {{jalink|鹿島天足別神社|Q20043641}} - 富谷市大亀和合田2-16 * {{jalink|熊野神社 (富谷市)|Q28690106}} - 富谷市富谷新町16 * 二ノ宮神社 - 富谷市二ノ関館下92 * {{jalink|八幡神社 (大和町)|Q22119988|吉岡八幡神社}} - 黒川郡{{jalink|大和町|Q1205377}}{{jalink|吉岡 (大和町)|Q11412777|吉岡}}字町裏39 * '''須岐神社''' - 黒川郡大衡村駒場字下宮前4 * {{jalink|大衡八幡神社|Q11438808}} - 黒川郡大衡村大衡字八幡48 === アクセス === * {{jalink|東北自動車道|Q428428}}{{jalink|大和インターチェンジ|Q10934247|大和IC}}から車で10分 * {{jalink|仙台北部道路|Q11377788}}{{jalink|富谷インターチェンジ|Q16144881|富谷IC}}から車で10分 * {{jalink|東北自動車道|Q428428}}{{jalink|泉インターチェンジ|Q11143029|泉IC}}から車で20分 === 脚注 === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} === 関連項目 === * {{jalink|志戸田用水隧道|Q20044788}} === 外部リンク === *[http://www.miyagi-jinjacho.or.jp/jinja-search/detail.php?code=310020371 宮城県神社庁] {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} {{デフォルトソート:ゆきしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Autogenerated pages with jawiki interwikis, possibly accidentally overwritten]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mutsu Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:宮城県の神社]] [[Category:富谷市の歴史]] [[Category:陸奥国の式内社]] [[Category:宮城県の旧村社]] [[Category:富谷市の建築物]] [[Category:need translation]]

|Image = [[File:Yuki shrine.JPG|270px]]
Shrine building |Location = {{jalink|Miyagi Prefecture|Q47896}}{{jalink|Tomiya City|Q1205173}} Shitoda, Aza Shiogama 15 |Coordinates = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |Enshrined deities = {{jalink|Sarutahiko-no-Ōkami}}, (associated) {{jalink|Emperor Sutoku|Q349287}}, (enshrined together) {{jalink|Ōmononushi-no-Ōkami}}, {{jalink|Iwanagahime-no-Mikoto}} |Sacred object = |Shrine rank = {{jalink|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|Shikinaisha}} |Founded = Said to date to around {{jalink|1700|Q6813}} |Main hall = Nagare-zukuri style main hall with copper plate roofing |Other names = Yuki Shrine Shiba Daimyōjin (Edo period) |Pilgrimage status = |Annual festival = First Sunday of April – Spring Grand Festival |Rituals = |Map = {{Location map|Japan Miyagi|label=Yuki Shrine|position=top|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Yuki Shrine''' (ゆきじんじゃ) is a shrine listed in the {{jalink|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|Engishiki Shikinaisha}} located in Shitoda, {{jalink|Tomiya City|Q1205173}}, {{jalink|Miyagi Prefecture|Q47896}}.{{Cite web|Japanese|url=http://www.town.tomiya.miyagi.jp/html/shuyu/index3.html|title=Tomiya City / Tomiya Shūyū|publisher=Tomiya City|accessdate=2015-03-09}} === Overview === The northern part of Tomiya City is characterized by expansive {{jalink|rice paddies}}, and the shrine stands atop a hill about 300 meters from a side road west of {{jalink|National Route 4|Q1055023}}, at the eastern edge of the {{jalink|hills|Q222912}} in the Shitoda area to the northwest. It is one of the Shikinaisha shrines, of which there were one hundred in the former {{jalink|Mutsu Province|Q907389}} and four in {{jalink|Kurokawa District|Q1131782}}. During the {{jalink|Daijōsai|Q11433653}}, two temporary halls—the Yuki-den and the Suki-den—are specially constructed to the east and west, where the ritual ceremonies are conducted. There is also a theory that considers the shrine’s significance in connection with Suki Shrine, which is enshrined in {{jalink|Ōhira Village|Q1204681}} to the north of this shrine. Within the precincts stands a cedar tree approximately 20 meters tall with a trunk circumference of over 3 meters, estimated to be more than 700 years old. === Nearby Shrines === * {{jalink|Kashima Amatariwake Shrine|Q20043641}} – 2-16 Wada, Ōgama, Tomiya City * {{jalink|Kumano Shrine (Tomiya City)|Q28690106}} – 16 Shimmachi, Tomiya, Tomiya City * Ninomiya Shrine – 92 Tatenoshita, Ninoseki, Tomiya City * {{jalink|Hachiman Shrine (Yamato Town)|Q22119988|Yoshioka Hachiman Shrine}} – 39 Machiura, Aza Yoshioka, {{jalink|Yamato Town|Q1205377}}, Kurokawa District * '''Suki Shrine''' – 4 Shimomiyamae, Aza Komaba, Kurokawa District, Ōhira Village * {{jalink|Ōhira Hachiman Shrine|Q11438808}} – 48 Hachiman, Aza Ōhira, Kurokawa District === Access === * About 10 minutes by car from {{jalink|Tōhoku Expressway|Q428428}} {{jalink|Yamato Interchange|Q10934247|Yamato IC}} * About 10 minutes by car from {{jalink|Sendai-Hokubu Road|Q11377788}} {{jalink|Tomiya Interchange|Q16144881|Tomiya IC}} * About 20 minutes by car from {{jalink|Tōhoku Expressway|Q428428}} {{jalink|Izumi Interchange|Q11143029|Izumi IC}} === Notes === {{Footnote help}} {{Reflist}} === See Also === * {{jalink|Shitoda Irrigation Tunnel|Q20044788}} === External Links === * [http://www.miyagi-jinjacho.or.jp/jinja-search/detail.php?code=310020371 Miyagi Prefecture Association of Shinto Shrines] {{Shinto horizontal}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Yukijinja}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mutsu Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:宮城県の神社]] [[Category:富谷市の歴史]] [[Category:陸奥国の式内社]] [[Category:宮城県の旧村社]] [[Category:富谷市の建築物]] [[Category:need translation]]

|Image = [[File:Yuki shrine.JPG|270px]]
Shrine building |Location = {{jalink|Miyagi Prefecture|Q47896}}{{jalink|Tomiya City|Q1205173}} Shitoda, Aza Shiogama 15 |Coordinates = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |Enshrined deities = {{jalink|Sarutahiko-no-Ōkami}}, (associated) {{jalink|Emperor Sutoku|Q349287}}, (enshrined together) {{jalink|Ōmononushi-no-Ōkami}}, {{jalink|Iwanagahime-no-Mikoto}} |Sacred object = |Shrine rank = {{jalink|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|Shikinaisha}} |Founded = Said to date to around {{jalink|1700|Q6813}} |Main hall = Nagare-zukuri style main hall with copper plate roofing |Other names = Yuki Shrine Shiba Daimyōjin (Edo period) |Pilgrimage status = |Annual festival = First Sunday of April – Spring Grand Festival |Rituals = |Map = {{Location map|Japan Miyagi|label=Yuki Shrine|position=top|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Yuki Shrine''' (ゆきじんじゃ) is a shrine listed in the {{jalink|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|Engishiki Shikinaisha}} located in Shitoda, {{jalink|Tomiya City|Q1205173}}, {{jalink|Miyagi Prefecture|Q47896}}.{{Cite web|Japanese|url=http://www.town.tomiya.miyagi.jp/html/shuyu/index3.html|title=Tomiya City / Tomiya Shūyū|publisher=Tomiya City|accessdate=2015-03-09}} === Overview === The northern part of Tomiya City is characterized by expansive {{jalink|rice paddies}}, and the shrine stands atop a hill about 300 meters from a side road west of {{jalink|National Route 4|Q1055023}}, at the eastern edge of the {{jalink|hills|Q222912}} in the Shitoda area to the northwest. It is one of the Shikinaisha shrines, of which there were one hundred in the former {{jalink|Mutsu Province|Q907389}} and four in {{jalink|Kurokawa District|Q1131782}}. During the {{jalink|Daijōsai|Q11433653}}, two temporary halls—the Yuki-den and the Suki-den—are specially constructed to the east and west, where the ritual ceremonies are conducted. There is also a theory that considers the shrine’s significance in connection with Suki Shrine, which is enshrined in {{jalink|Ōhira Village|Q1204681}} to the north of this shrine. Within the precincts stands a cedar tree approximately 20 meters tall with a trunk circumference of over 3 meters, estimated to be more than 700 years old. === Nearby Shrines === * {{jalink|Kashima Amatariwake Shrine|Q20043641}} – 2-16 Wada, Ōgama, Tomiya City * {{jalink|Kumano Shrine (Tomiya City)|Q28690106}} – 16 Shimmachi, Tomiya, Tomiya City * Ninomiya Shrine – 92 Tatenoshita, Ninoseki, Tomiya City * {{jalink|Hachiman Shrine (Yamato Town)|Q22119988|Yoshioka Hachiman Shrine}} – 39 Machiura, Aza Yoshioka, {{jalink|Yamato Town|Q1205377}}, Kurokawa District * '''Suki Shrine''' – 4 Shimomiyamae, Aza Komaba, Kurokawa District, Ōhira Village * {{jalink|Ōhira Hachiman Shrine|Q11438808}} – 48 Hachiman, Aza Ōhira, Kurokawa District === Access === * About 10 minutes by car from {{jalink|Tōhoku Expressway|Q428428}} {{jalink|Yamato Interchange|Q10934247|Yamato IC}} * About 10 minutes by car from {{jalink|Sendai-Hokubu Road|Q11377788}} {{jalink|Tomiya Interchange|Q16144881|Tomiya IC}} * About 20 minutes by car from {{jalink|Tōhoku Expressway|Q428428}} {{jalink|Izumi Interchange|Q11143029|Izumi IC}} === Notes === {{Footnote help}} {{Reflist}} === See Also === * {{jalink|Shitoda Irrigation Tunnel|Q20044788}} === External Links === * [http://www.miyagi-jinjacho.or.jp/jinja-search/detail.php?code=310020371 Miyagi Prefecture Association of Shinto Shrines] {{Shinto horizontal}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Yukijinja}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mutsu Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:宮城県の神社]] [[Category:富谷市の歴史]] [[Category:陸奥国の式内社]] [[Category:宮城県の旧村社]] [[Category:富谷市の建築物]]

Ronsha|ja|論社|WD=Q135022904}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '宮城県富谷市志戸田字塩竈15', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:行神社]] {{wikidata link|Q22120773}} == Japanese content == {{Shrine |Name = Yuki Shrine |Image = [[File:Yuki shrine.JPG|270px]]
Shrine building |Location = {{jalink|Miyagi Prefecture|Q47896}}{{jalink|Tomiya City|Q1205173}} Shitoda, Aza Shiogama 15 |Coordinates = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |Enshrined deities = {{jalink|Sarutahiko-no-Ōkami}}, (associated) {{jalink|Emperor Sutoku|Q349287}}, (enshrined together) {{jalink|Ōmononushi-no-Ōkami}}, {{jalink|Iwanagahime-no-Mikoto}} |Sacred object = |Shrine rank = {{jalink|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|Shikinaisha}} |Founded = Said to date to around {{jalink|1700|Q6813}} |Main hall = Nagare-zukuri style main hall with copper plate roofing |Other names = Yuki Shrine Shiba Daimyōjin (Edo period) |Pilgrimage status = |Annual festival = First Sunday of April – Spring Grand Festival |Rituals = |Map = {{Location map|Japan Miyagi|label=Yuki Shrine|position=top|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Yuki Shrine''' (ゆきじんじゃ) is a shrine listed in the {{jalink|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|Engishiki Shikinaisha}} located in Shitoda, {{jalink|Tomiya City|Q1205173}}, {{jalink|Miyagi Prefecture|Q47896}}.{{Cite web|Japanese|url=http://www.town.tomiya.miyagi.jp/html/shuyu/index3.html|title=Tomiya City / Tomiya Shūyū|publisher=Tomiya City|accessdate=2015-03-09}} === Overview === The northern part of Tomiya City is characterized by expansive {{jalink|rice paddies}}, and the shrine stands atop a hill about 300 meters from a side road west of {{jalink|National Route 4|Q1055023}}, at the eastern edge of the {{jalink|hills|Q222912}} in the Shitoda area to the northwest. It is one of the Shikinaisha shrines, of which there were one hundred in the former {{jalink|Mutsu Province|Q907389}} and four in {{jalink|Kurokawa District|Q1131782}}. During the {{jalink|Daijōsai|Q11433653}}, two temporary halls—the Yuki-den and the Suki-den—are specially constructed to the east and west, where the ritual ceremonies are conducted. There is also a theory that considers the shrine’s significance in connection with Suki Shrine, which is enshrined in {{jalink|Ōhira Village|Q1204681}} to the north of this shrine. Within the precincts stands a cedar tree approximately 20 meters tall with a trunk circumference of over 3 meters, estimated to be more than 700 years old. === Nearby Shrines === * {{jalink|Kashima Amatariwake Shrine|Q20043641}} – 2-16 Wada, Ōgama, Tomiya City * {{jalink|Kumano Shrine (Tomiya City)|Q28690106}} – 16 Shimmachi, Tomiya, Tomiya City * Ninomiya Shrine – 92 Tatenoshita, Ninoseki, Tomiya City * {{jalink|Hachiman Shrine (Yamato Town)|Q22119988|Yoshioka Hachiman Shrine}} – 39 Machiura, Aza Yoshioka, {{jalink|Yamato Town|Q1205377}}, Kurokawa District * '''Suki Shrine''' – 4 Shimomiyamae, Aza Komaba, Kurokawa District, Ōhira Village * {{jalink|Ōhira Hachiman Shrine|Q11438808}} – 48 Hachiman, Aza Ōhira, Kurokawa District === Access === * About 10 minutes by car from {{jalink|Tōhoku Expressway|Q428428}} {{jalink|Yamato Interchange|Q10934247|Yamato IC}} * About 10 minutes by car from {{jalink|Sendai-Hokubu Road|Q11377788}} {{jalink|Tomiya Interchange|Q16144881|Tomiya IC}} * About 20 minutes by car from {{jalink|Tōhoku Expressway|Q428428}} {{jalink|Izumi Interchange|Q11143029|Izumi IC}} === Notes === {{Footnote help}} {{Reflist}} === See Also === * {{jalink|Shitoda Irrigation Tunnel|Q20044788}} === External Links === * [http://www.miyagi-jinjacho.or.jp/jinja-search/detail.php?code=310020371 Miyagi Prefecture Association of Shinto Shrines] {{Shinto horizontal}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Yukijinja}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Yuki Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Yuki Shrine]][[Category:Pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mutsu Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:宮城県の神社]] [[Category:富谷市の歴史]] [[Category:陸奥国の式内社]] [[Category:宮城県の旧村社]] [[Category:富谷市の建築物]]

Shrine building |Location = {{ill|lt=Miyagi Prefecture|Q47896|WD=Q47896}}{{ill|lt=Tomiya City|Q1205173|WD=Q1205173}} Shitoda, Aza Shiogama 15 |Coordinates = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |Enshrined deities = {{ill||lt=Sarutahiko-no-Ōkami|UNKNOWN}}, (associated) {{ill|lt=Emperor Sutoku|Q349287|WD=Q349287}}, (enshrined together) {{ill||lt=Ōmononushi-no-Ōkami|UNKNOWN}}, {{ill||lt=Iwanagahime-no-Mikoto|UNKNOWN}} |Sacred object = |Shrine rank = {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|lt=Shikinaisha}} |Founded = Said to date to around {{ill|lt=1700|Q6813|WD=Q6813}} |Main hall = Nagare-zukuri style main hall with copper plate roofing |Other names = Yuki Shrine Shiba Daimyōjin (Edo period) |Pilgrimage status = |Annual festival = First Sunday of April – Spring Grand Festival |Rituals = |Map = {{Location map|Japan Miyagi|label=Yuki Shrine|position=top|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Yuki Shrine''' (ゆきじんじゃ) is a shrine listed in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|lt=Engishiki Shikinaisha}} located in Shitoda, {{ill|lt=Tomiya City|Q1205173|WD=Q1205173}}, {{ill|lt=Miyagi Prefecture|Q47896|WD=Q47896}}.{{Cite web|Japanese|url=http://www.town.tomiya.miyagi.jp/html/shuyu/index3.html|title=Tomiya City / Tomiya Shūyū|publisher=Tomiya City|accessdate=2015-03-09}} === Overview === The northern part of Tomiya City is characterized by expansive {{ill||lt=rice paddies|UNKNOWN}}, and the shrine stands atop a hill about 300 meters from a side road west of {{ill|lt=National Route 4|Q1055023|WD=Q1055023}}, at the eastern edge of the {{ill|lt=hills|Q222912|WD=Q222912}} in the Shitoda area to the northwest. It is one of the Shikinaisha shrines, of which there were one hundred in the former {{ill|lt=Mutsu Province|Q907389|WD=Q907389}} and four in {{ill|lt=Kurokawa District|Q1131782|WD=Q1131782}}. During the {{ill|lt=Daijōsai|Q11433653|WD=Q11433653}}, two temporary halls—the Yuki-den and the Suki-den—are specially constructed to the east and west, where the ritual ceremonies are conducted. There is also a theory that considers the shrine’s significance in connection with Suki Shrine, which is enshrined in {{ill|lt=Ōhira Village|Q1204681|WD=Q1204681}} to the north of this shrine. Within the precincts stands a cedar tree approximately 20 meters tall with a trunk circumference of over 3 meters, estimated to be more than 700 years old. === Nearby Shrines === * {{ill|lt=Kashima Amatariwake Shrine|Q20043641|WD=Q20043641}} – 2-16 Wada, Ōgama, Tomiya City * {{ill|lt=Kumano Shrine (Tomiya City)|Q28690106|WD=Q28690106}} – 16 Shimmachi, Tomiya, Tomiya City * Ninomiya Shrine – 92 Tatenoshita, Ninoseki, Tomiya City * {{ill|lt=Hachiman Shrine (Yamato Town)|Q22119988|WD=Q22119988|lt=Yoshioka Hachiman Shrine}} – 39 Machiura, Aza Yoshioka, {{ill|lt=Yamato Town|Q1205377|WD=Q1205377}}, Kurokawa District * '''Suki Shrine''' – 4 Shimomiyamae, Aza Komaba, Kurokawa District, Ōhira Village * {{ill|lt=Ōhira Hachiman Shrine|Q11438808|WD=Q11438808}} – 48 Hachiman, Aza Ōhira, Kurokawa District === Access === * About 10 minutes by car from {{ill|lt=Tōhoku Expressway|Q428428|WD=Q428428}} {{ill|lt=Yamato Interchange|Q10934247|WD=Q10934247|lt=Yamato IC}} * About 10 minutes by car from {{ill|lt=Sendai-Hokubu Road|Q11377788|WD=Q11377788}} {{ill|lt=Tomiya Interchange|Q16144881|WD=Q16144881|lt=Tomiya IC}} * About 20 minutes by car from {{ill|lt=Tōhoku Expressway|Q428428|WD=Q428428}} {{ill|lt=Izumi Interchange|Q11143029|WD=Q11143029|lt=Izumi IC}} === Notes === {{Footnote help}} {{Reflist}} === See Also === * {{ill|lt=Shitoda Irrigation Tunnel|Q20044788|WD=Q20044788}} === External Links === * [http://www.miyagi-jinjacho.or.jp/jinja-search/detail.php?code=310020371 Miyagi Prefecture Association of Shinto Shrines] {{Shinto horizontal}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Yukijinja}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Yuki Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Yuki Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mutsu Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:宮城県の神社]] [[Category:富谷市の歴史]] [[Category:陸奥国の式内社]] [[Category:宮城県の旧村社]] [[Category:富谷市の建築物]]

Within the precincts stands a cedar tree approximately 20 meters tall with a trunk circumference of over 3 meters, estimated to be more than 700 years old. === Nearby Shrines === * {{ill|lt=Kashima Amatariwake Shrine|Q20043641|WD=Q20043641}} – 2-16 Wada, Ōgama, Tomiya City * {{ill|lt=Kumano Shrine (Tomiya City)|Q28690106|WD=Q28690106}} – 16 Shimmachi, Tomiya, Tomiya City * Ninomiya Shrine – 92 Tatenoshita, Ninoseki, Tomiya City * {{ill|lt=Hachiman Shrine (Yamato Town)|Q22119988|WD=Q22119988|lt=Yoshioka Hachiman Shrine}} – 39 Machiura, Aza Yoshioka, {{ill|lt=Yamato Town|Q1205377|WD=Q1205377}}, Kurokawa District * '''Suki Shrine''' – 4 Shimomiyamae, Aza Komaba, Kurokawa District, Ōhira Village * {{ill|lt=Ōhira Hachiman Shrine|Q11438808|WD=Q11438808}} – 48 Hachiman, Aza Ōhira, Kurokawa District === Access === * About 10 minutes by car from {{ill|lt=Tōhoku Expressway|Q428428|WD=Q428428}} {{ill|lt=Yamato Interchange|Q10934247|WD=Q10934247|lt=Yamato IC}} * About 10 minutes by car from {{ill|lt=Sendai-Hokubu Road|Q11377788|WD=Q11377788}} {{ill|lt=Tomiya Interchange|Q16144881|WD=Q16144881|lt=Tomiya IC}} * About 20 minutes by car from {{ill|lt=Tōhoku Expressway|Q428428|WD=Q428428}} {{ill|lt=Izumi Interchange|Q11143029|WD=Q11143029|lt=Izumi IC}} === Notes === {{Footnote help}} {{Reflist}} === See Also === * {{ill|lt=Shitoda Irrigation Tunnel|Q20044788|WD=Q20044788}} === External Links === * [http://www.miyagi-jinjacho.or.jp/jinja-search/detail.php?code=310020371 Miyagi Prefecture Association of Shinto Shrines] {{Shinto horizontal}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Yukijinja}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Yuki Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Yuki Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mutsu Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:宮城県の神社]] [[Category:富谷市の歴史]] [[Category:陸奥国の式内社]] [[Category:宮城県の旧村社]] [[Category:富谷市の建築物]]

Shrine building |Location = {{ill|lt=Miyagi Prefecture|Q47896|WD=Q47896}}{{ill|lt=Tomiya City|Q1205173|WD=Q1205173}} Shitoda, Aza Shiogama 15 |Coordinates = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |Enshrined deities = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Sarutahiko-no-Ōkami|1=UNKNOWN}}, (associated) {{ill|lt=Emperor Sutoku|Q349287|WD=Q349287}}, (enshrined together) {{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q10936701|lt=Ōmononushi-no-Ōkami|1=UNKNOWN}}, {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Iwanagahime-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} |Sacred object = |Shrine rank = {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|lt=Shikinaisha}} |Founded = Said to date to around {{ill|lt=1700|Q6813|WD=Q6813}} |Main hall = Nagare-zukuri style main hall with copper plate roofing |Other names = Yuki Shrine Shiba Daimyōjin (Edo period) |Pilgrimage status = |Annual festival = First Sunday of April – Spring Grand Festival |Rituals = |Map = {{Location map|Japan Miyagi|label=Yuki Shrine|position=top|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Yuki Shrine''' (ゆきじんじゃ) is a shrine listed in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|lt=Engishiki Shikinaisha}} located in Shitoda, {{ill|lt=Tomiya City|Q1205173|WD=Q1205173}}, {{ill|lt=Miyagi Prefecture|Q47896|WD=Q47896}}.{{Cite web|Japanese|url=http://www.town.tomiya.miyagi.jp/html/shuyu/index3.html|title=Tomiya City / Tomiya Shūyū|publisher=Tomiya City|accessdate=2015-03-09}} === Overview === The northern part of Tomiya City is characterized by expansive {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=rice paddies|1=UNKNOWN}}, and the shrine stands atop a hill about 300 meters from a side road west of {{ill|lt=National Route 4|Q1055023|WD=Q1055023}}, at the eastern edge of the {{ill|lt=hills|Q222912|WD=Q222912}} in the Shitoda area to the northwest. It is one of the Shikinaisha shrines, of which there were one hundred in the former {{ill|lt=Mutsu Province|Q907389|WD=Q907389}} and four in {{ill|lt=Kurokawa District|Q1131782|WD=Q1131782}}. During the {{ill|lt=Daijōsai|Q11433653|WD=Q11433653}}, two temporary halls—the Yuki-den and the Suki-den—are specially constructed to the east and west, where the ritual ceremonies are conducted. There is also a theory that considers the shrine’s significance in connection with Suki Shrine, which is enshrined in {{ill|lt=Ōhira Village|Q1204681|WD=Q1204681}} to the north of this shrine. Within the precincts stands a cedar tree approximately 20 meters tall with a trunk circumference of over 3 meters, estimated to be more than 700 years old. === Nearby Shrines === * {{ill|lt=Kashima Amatariwake Shrine|Q20043641|WD=Q20043641}} – 2-16 Wada, Ōgama, Tomiya City * {{ill|lt=Kumano Shrine (Tomiya City)|Q28690106|WD=Q28690106}} – 16 Shimmachi, Tomiya, Tomiya City * Ninomiya Shrine – 92 Tatenoshita, Ninoseki, Tomiya City * {{ill|lt=Hachiman Shrine (Yamato Town)|Q22119988|WD=Q22119988|lt=Yoshioka Hachiman Shrine}} – 39 Machiura, Aza Yoshioka, {{ill|lt=Yamato Town|Q1205377|WD=Q1205377}}, Kurokawa District * '''Suki Shrine''' – 4 Shimomiyamae, Aza Komaba, Kurokawa District, Ōhira Village * {{ill|lt=Ōhira Hachiman Shrine|Q11438808|WD=Q11438808}} – 48 Hachiman, Aza Ōhira, Kurokawa District === Access === * About 10 minutes by car from {{ill|lt=Tōhoku Expressway|Q428428|WD=Q428428}} {{ill|lt=Yamato Interchange|Q10934247|WD=Q10934247|lt=Yamato IC}} * About 10 minutes by car from {{ill|lt=Sendai-Hokubu Road|Q11377788|WD=Q11377788}} {{ill|lt=Tomiya Interchange|Q16144881|WD=Q16144881|lt=Tomiya IC}} * About 20 minutes by car from {{ill|lt=Tōhoku Expressway|Q428428|WD=Q428428}} {{ill|lt=Izumi Interchange|Q11143029|WD=Q11143029|lt=Izumi IC}} === Notes === {{Footnote help}} {{Reflist}} === See Also === * {{ill|lt=Shitoda Irrigation Tunnel|Q20044788|WD=Q20044788}} === External Links === * [http://www.miyagi-jinjacho.or.jp/jinja-search/detail.php?code=310020371 Miyagi Prefecture Association of Shinto Shrines] {{Shinto horizontal}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Yukijinja}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Yuki Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Yuki Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mutsu Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:宮城県の神社]] [[Category:富谷市の歴史]] [[Category:陸奥国の式内社]] [[Category:宮城県の旧村社]] [[Category:富谷市の建築物]]

together) {{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q10936701|lt=Ōmononushi-no-Ōkami|1=Ōmononushi}}, {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Iwanagahime-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} |Sacred object = |Shrine rank = {{ill|lt=Engishiki plate roofing |Other names = Yuki Shrine Shiba Daimyōjin (Edo period) |Pilgrimage status = |Annual festival = First Sunday of April – Spring Grand Festival |Rituals = |Map = {{Location map|Japan Miyagi|label=Yuki Shrine|position=top|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Yuki Shrine''' (ゆきじんじゃ) is a shrine listed in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|lt=Engishiki Shikinaisha|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}} located in Shitoda, {{ill|lt=Tomiya City|Q1205173|WD=Q1205173|1=Tomiya, Miyagi}}, {{ill|lt=Miyagi Prefecture|Q47896|WD=Q47896|1=Miyagi Prefecture}}.{{Cite web|Japanese|url=http://www.town.tomiya.miyagi.jp/html/shuyu/index3.html|title=Tomiya City / Tomiya Shūyū|publisher=Tomiya City|accessdate=2015-03-09}} === Overview === The northern part of Tomiya City is characterized by expansive {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=rice paddies|1=UNKNOWN}}, and the shrine stands atop a hill about 300 meters from a side road west of {{ill|lt=National Route 4|Q1055023|WD=Q1055023|1=Japan National Route 4}}, at the eastern edge of the {{ill|lt=hills|Q222912|WD=Q222912|1=Hügelland}} in the Shitoda area to the northwest. It is one of the Shikinaisha shrines, of which there were one hundred in the former {{ill|lt=Mutsu Province|Q907389|WD=Q907389|1=Mutsu Province}} and four in {{ill|lt=Kurokawa District|Q1131782|WD=Q1131782|1=Kurokawa District, Miyagi}}. During the {{ill|lt=Daijōsai|Q11433653|WD=Q11433653|1=Daijosai}}, two temporary halls—the Yuki-den and the Suki-den—are specially constructed to the east and west, where the ritual ceremonies are conducted. There is also a theory that considers the shrine’s significance in connection with Suki Shrine, which is enshrined in {{ill|lt=Ōhira Village|Q1204681|WD=Q1204681|1=Ōhira, Miyagi}} to the north of this shrine. Within the precincts stands a cedar tree approximately 20 meters tall with a trunk circumference of over 3 meters, estimated to be more than 700 years old. === Nearby Shrines === * {{ill|lt=Kashima Amatariwake Shrine|Q20043641|WD=Q20043641|1=Kashima Amatarashiwake Shrine}} – 2-16 Wada, Ōgama, Tomiya City * {{ill|lt=Kumano Shrine (Tomiya City)|Q28690106|WD=Q28690106|1=Kumano Shrine}} – 16 Shimmachi, Tomiya, Tomiya City * Ninomiya Shrine – 92 Tatenoshita, Ninoseki, Tomiya City * {{ill|lt=Hachiman Shrine (Yamato Town)|Q22119988|WD=Q22119988|lt=Yoshioka Hachiman Shrine|1=Hachiman Shrine}} – 39 Machiura, Aza Yoshioka, {{ill|lt=Yamato Town|Q1205377|WD=Q1205377|1=Taiwa, Miyagi}}, Kurokawa District * '''Suki Shrine''' – 4 Shimomiyamae, Aza Komaba, Kurokawa District, Ōhira Village * {{ill|lt=Ōhira Hachiman Shrine|Q11438808|WD=Q11438808|1=Ōhira Hachiman Shrine}} – 48 Hachiman, Aza Ōhira, Kurokawa District === Access === * About 10 minutes by car from {{ill|lt=Tōhoku Expressway|Q428428|WD=Q428428|1=Tōhoku Expressway}} {{ill|lt=Yamato Interchange|Q10934247|WD=Q10934247|lt=Yamato IC|1=Taiwa interchange}} * About 10 minutes by car from {{ill|lt=Sendai-Hokubu Road|Q11377788|WD=Q11377788|1=Sendai-Hokubu Road}} {{ill|lt=Tomiya Interchange|Q16144881|WD=Q16144881|lt=Tomiya IC|1=Tomiya interchange}} * About 20 minutes by car from {{ill|lt=Tōhoku Expressway|Q428428|WD=Q428428|1=Tōhoku Expressway}} {{ill|lt=Izumi Interchange|Q11143029|WD=Q11143029|lt=Izumi IC|1=Izumi interchange}} === Notes === {{Footnote help}} {{Reflist}} === See Also === * Prefecture Association of Shinto Shrines] {{Shinto horizontal}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Yukijinja}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Yuki together) {{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q10936701|lt=Ōmononushi-no-Ōkami|1=Ōmononushi}}, {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Iwanagahime-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} |Sacred object = |Shrine rank = {{ill|lt=Engishiki plate roofing |Other names = Yuki Shrine Shiba Daimyōjin (Edo period) |Pilgrimage status = |Annual festival = First Sunday of April – Spring Grand Festival |Rituals = |Map = {{Location map|Japan Miyagi|label=Yuki Shrine|position=top|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Yuki Shrine''' (ゆきじんじゃ) is a shrine listed in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|lt=Engishiki Shikinaisha|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}} located in Shitoda, {{ill|lt=Tomiya City|Q1205173|WD=Q1205173|1=Tomiya, Miyagi}}, {{ill|lt=Miyagi Prefecture|Q47896|WD=Q47896|1=Miyagi Prefecture}}.{{Cite web|Japanese|url=http://www.town.tomiya.miyagi.jp/html/shuyu/index3.html|title=Tomiya City / Tomiya Shūyū|publisher=Tomiya City|accessdate=2015-03-09}} === Overview === The northern part of Tomiya City is characterized by expansive {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=rice paddies|1=UNKNOWN}}, and the shrine stands atop a hill about 300 meters from a side road west of {{ill|lt=National Route 4|Q1055023|WD=Q1055023|1=Japan National Route 4}}, at the eastern edge of the {{ill|lt=hills|Q222912|WD=Q222912|1=Hügelland}} in the Shitoda area to the northwest. It is one of the Shikinaisha shrines, of which there were one hundred in the former {{ill|lt=Mutsu Province|Q907389|WD=Q907389|1=Mutsu Province}} and four in {{ill|lt=Kurokawa District|Q1131782|WD=Q1131782|1=Kurokawa District, Miyagi}}. During the {{ill|lt=Daijōsai|Q11433653|WD=Q11433653|1=Daijosai}}, two temporary halls—the Yuki-den and the Suki-den—are specially constructed to the east and west, where the ritual ceremonies are conducted. There is also a theory that considers the shrine’s significance in connection with Suki Shrine, which is enshrined in {{ill|lt=Ōhira Village|Q1204681|WD=Q1204681|1=Ōhira, Miyagi}} to the north of this shrine. Within the precincts stands a cedar tree approximately 20 meters tall with a trunk circumference of over 3 meters, estimated to be more than 700 years old. === Nearby Shrines === * {{ill|lt=Kashima Amatariwake Shrine|Q20043641|WD=Q20043641|1=Kashima Amatarashiwake Shrine}} – 2-16 Wada, Ōgama, Tomiya City * {{ill|lt=Kumano Shrine (Tomiya City)|Q28690106|WD=Q28690106|1=Kumano Shrine}} – 16 Shimmachi, Tomiya, Tomiya City * Ninomiya Shrine – 92 Tatenoshita, Ninoseki, Tomiya City * {{ill|lt=Hachiman Shrine (Yamato Town)|Q22119988|WD=Q22119988|lt=Yoshioka Hachiman Shrine|1=Hachiman Shrine}} – 39 Machiura, Aza Yoshioka, {{ill|lt=Yamato Town|Q1205377|WD=Q1205377|1=Taiwa, Miyagi}}, Kurokawa District * '''Suki Shrine''' – 4 Shimomiyamae, Aza Komaba, Kurokawa District, Ōhira Village * {{ill|lt=Ōhira Hachiman Shrine|Q11438808|WD=Q11438808|1=Ōhira Hachiman Shrine}} – 48 Hachiman, Aza Ōhira, Kurokawa District === Access === * About 10 minutes by car from {{ill|lt=Tōhoku Expressway|Q428428|WD=Q428428|1=Tōhoku Expressway}} {{ill|lt=Yamato Interchange|Q10934247|WD=Q10934247|lt=Yamato IC|1=Taiwa interchange}} * About 10 minutes by car from {{ill|lt=Sendai-Hokubu Road|Q11377788|WD=Q11377788|1=Sendai-Hokubu Road}} {{ill|lt=Tomiya Interchange|Q16144881|WD=Q16144881|lt=Tomiya IC|1=Tomiya interchange}} * About 20 minutes by car from {{ill|lt=Tōhoku Expressway|Q428428|WD=Q428428|1=Tōhoku Expressway}} {{ill|lt=Izumi Interchange|Q11143029|WD=Q11143029|lt=Izumi IC|1=Izumi interchange}} === Notes === {{Footnote help}} {{Reflist}} === See Also === * {{ill|lt=Shitoda Irrigation Tunnel|Q20044788|WD=Q20044788|1=Shitoda Irrigation Tunnel}} === External Links === * [http://www.miyagi-jinjacho.or.jp/jinja-search/detail.php?code=310020371 Miyagi Prefecture Association of Shinto Shrines] {{Shinto horizontal}} {{shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Yuki Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Yuki Shrine building |Location = {{ill|lt=Miyagi Prefecture|Q47896|WD=Q47896|1=Miyagi Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Tomiya City|Q1205173|WD=Q1205173|1=Tomiya, Miyagi}} Shitoda, Aza Shiogama 15 |Coordinates = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |Enshrined deities = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Sarutahiko-no-Ōkami|1=UNKNOWN}}, (associated) {{ill|lt=Emperor Sutoku|Q349287|WD=Q349287|1=Emperor Sutoku}}, (enshrined together) {{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q10936701|lt=Ōmononushi-no-Ōkami|1=Ōmononushi}}, {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Iwanagahime-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} |Sacred object = |Shrine rank = {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}} |Founded = Said to date to around {{ill|lt=1700|Q6813|WD=Q6813|1=1700}} |Main hall = Nagare-zukuri style main hall with copper plate roofing |Other names = Yuki Shrine Shiba Daimyōjin (Edo period) |Pilgrimage status = |Annual festival = First Sunday of April – Spring Grand Festival |Rituals = |Map = {{Location map|Japan Miyagi|label=Yuki Shrine|position=top|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Yuki Shrine''' (ゆきじんじゃ) is a shrine listed in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|lt=Engishiki Shikinaisha|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}} located in Shitoda, {{ill|lt=Tomiya City|Q1205173|WD=Q1205173|1=Tomiya, Miyagi}}, {{ill|lt=Miyagi Prefecture|Q47896|WD=Q47896|1=Miyagi Prefecture}}.{{Cite web|Japanese|url=http://www.town.tomiya.miyagi.jp/html/shuyu/index3.html|title=Tomiya City / Tomiya Shūyū|publisher=Tomiya City|accessdate=2015-03-09}} === Overview === The northern part of Tomiya City is characterized by expansive {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=rice paddies|1=UNKNOWN}}, and the shrine stands atop a hill about 300 meters from a side road west of {{ill|lt=National Route 4|Q1055023|WD=Q1055023|1=Japan National Route 4}}, at the eastern edge of the {{ill|lt=hills|Q222912|WD=Q222912|1=Hügelland}} in the Shitoda area to the northwest. It is one of the Shikinaisha shrines, of which there were one hundred in the former {{ill|lt=Mutsu Province|Q907389|WD=Q907389|1=Mutsu Province}} and four in {{ill|lt=Kurokawa District|Q1131782|WD=Q1131782|1=Kurokawa District, Miyagi}}. During the {{ill|lt=Daijōsai|Q11433653|WD=Q11433653|1=Daijosai}}, two temporary halls—the Yuki-den and the Suki-den—are specially constructed to the east and west, where the ritual ceremonies are conducted. There is also a theory that considers the shrine’s significance in connection with Suki Shrine, which is enshrined in {{ill|lt=Ōhira Village|Q1204681|WD=Q1204681|1=Ōhira, Miyagi}} to the north of this shrine. Within the precincts stands a cedar tree approximately 20 meters tall with a trunk circumference of over 3 meters, estimated to be more than 700 years old. === Nearby Shrines === * {{ill|lt=Kashima Amatariwake Shrine|Q20043641|WD=Q20043641|1=Kashima Amatarashiwake Shrine}} – 2-16 Wada, Ōgama, Tomiya City * {{ill|lt=Kumano Shrine (Tomiya City)|Q28690106|WD=Q28690106|1=Kumano Shrine}} – 16 Shimmachi, Tomiya, Tomiya City * Ninomiya Shrine – 92 Tatenoshita, Ninoseki, Tomiya City * {{ill|lt=Hachiman Shrine (Yamato Town)|Q22119988|WD=Q22119988|lt=Yoshioka Hachiman Shrine|1=Hachiman Shrine}} – 39 Machiura, Aza Yoshioka, {{ill|lt=Yamato Town|Q1205377|WD=Q1205377|1=Taiwa, Miyagi}}, Kurokawa District * '''Suki Shrine''' – 4 Shimomiyamae, Aza Komaba, Kurokawa District, Ōhira Village * {{ill|lt=Ōhira Hachiman Shrine|Q11438808|WD=Q11438808|1=Ōhira Hachiman Shrine}} – 48 Hachiman, Aza Ōhira, Kurokawa District === Access === * About 10 minutes by car from {{ill|lt=Tōhoku Expressway|Q428428|WD=Q428428|1=Tōhoku Expressway}} {{ill|lt=Yamato Interchange|Q10934247|WD=Q10934247|lt=Yamato IC|1=Taiwa interchange}} * About 10 minutes by car from {{ill|lt=Sendai-Hokubu Road|Q11377788|WD=Q11377788|1=Sendai-Hokubu Road}} {{ill|lt=Tomiya Interchange|Q16144881|WD=Q16144881|lt=Tomiya IC|1=Tomiya interchange}} * About 20 minutes by car from {{ill|lt=Tōhoku Expressway|Q428428|WD=Q428428|1=Tōhoku Expressway}} {{ill|lt=Izumi Interchange|Q11143029|WD=Q11143029|lt=Izumi IC|1=Izumi interchange}} === Notes === {{Footnote help}} {{Reflist}} === See Also === * {{ill|lt=Shitoda Irrigation Tunnel|Q20044788|WD=Q20044788|1=Shitoda Irrigation Tunnel}} === External Links === * [http://www.miyagi-jinjacho.or.jp/jinja-search/detail.php?code=310020371 Miyagi Prefecture Association of Shinto Shrines] {{Shinto horizontal}} {{shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Yuki Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Yuki Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mutsu Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Miyagi Prefecture]] [[Category:富谷市の歴史]] [[Category:陸奥国の式内社]] [[Category:Son-sha in Miyagi Prefecture]] [[Category:富谷市の建築物]]

plate roofing |Other names = Yuki Shrine Shiba Daimyōjin (Edo period) |Pilgrimage status = |Annual festival = First Sunday of April – Spring Grand Festival |Rituals = |Map = {{Location map|Japan Miyagi|label=Yuki Shrine|position=top|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Yuki Shrine''' (ゆきじんじゃ) is a shrine listed in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|lt=Engishiki Shikinaisha|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}} located in Shitoda, {{ill|lt=Tomiya City|Q1205173|WD=Q1205173|1=Tomiya, Miyagi}}, {{ill|lt=Miyagi Prefecture|Q47896|WD=Q47896|1=Miyagi Prefecture}}.{{Cite web|Japanese|url=http://www.town.tomiya.miyagi.jp/html/shuyu/index3.html|title=Tomiya City / Tomiya Shūyū|publisher=Tomiya City|accessdate=2015-03-09}} === Overview === The northern part of Tomiya City is characterized by expansive {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=rice paddies|1=UNKNOWN}}, and the shrine stands atop a hill about 300 meters from a side road west of {{ill|lt=National Route 4|Q1055023|WD=Q1055023|1=Japan National Route 4}}, at the eastern edge of the {{ill|lt=hills|Q222912|WD=Q222912|1=Hügelland}} in the Shitoda area to the northwest. It is one of the Shikinaisha shrines, of which there were one hundred in the former {{ill|lt=Mutsu Province|Q907389|WD=Q907389|1=Mutsu Province}} and four in {{ill|lt=Kurokawa District|Q1131782|WD=Q1131782|1=Kurokawa District, Miyagi}}. During the {{ill|lt=Daijōsai|Q11433653|WD=Q11433653|1=Daijosai}}, two temporary halls—the Yuki-den and the Suki-den—are specially constructed to the east and west, where the ritual ceremonies are conducted. There is also a theory that considers the shrine’s significance in connection with Suki Shrine, which is enshrined in {{ill|lt=Ōhira Village|Q1204681|WD=Q1204681|1=Ōhira, Miyagi}} to the north of this shrine. Within the precincts stands a cedar tree approximately 20 meters tall with a trunk circumference of over 3 meters, estimated to be more than 700 years old. === Nearby Shrines === * {{ill|lt=Kashima Amatariwake Shrine|Q20043641|WD=Q20043641|1=Kashima Amatarashiwake Shrine}} – 2-16 Wada, Ōgama, Tomiya City * {{ill|lt=Kumano Shrine (Tomiya City)|Q28690106|WD=Q28690106|1=Kumano Shrine}} – 16 Shimmachi, Tomiya, Tomiya City * Ninomiya Shrine – 92 Tatenoshita, Ninoseki, Tomiya City * {{ill|lt=Hachiman Shrine (Yamato Town)|Q22119988|WD=Q22119988|lt=Yoshioka Hachiman Shrine|1=Hachiman Shrine}} – 39 Machiura, Aza Yoshioka, {{ill|lt=Yamato Town|Q1205377|WD=Q1205377|1=Taiwa, Miyagi}}, Kurokawa District * '''Suki Shrine''' – 4 Shimomiyamae, Aza Komaba, Kurokawa District, Ōhira Village * {{ill|lt=Ōhira Hachiman Shrine|Q11438808|WD=Q11438808|1=Ōhira Hachiman Shrine}} – 48 Hachiman, Aza Ōhira, Kurokawa District === Access === * About 10 minutes by car from {{ill|lt=Tōhoku Expressway|Q428428|WD=Q428428|1=Tōhoku Expressway}} {{ill|lt=Yamato Interchange|Q10934247|WD=Q10934247|lt=Yamato IC|1=Taiwa interchange}} * About 10 minutes by car from {{ill|lt=Sendai-Hokubu Road|Q11377788|WD=Q11377788|1=Sendai-Hokubu Road}} {{ill|lt=Tomiya Interchange|Q16144881|WD=Q16144881|lt=Tomiya IC|1=Tomiya interchange}} * About 20 minutes by car from {{ill|lt=Tōhoku Expressway|Q428428|WD=Q428428|1=Tōhoku Expressway}} {{ill|lt=Izumi Interchange|Q11143029|WD=Q11143029|lt=Izumi IC|1=Izumi interchange}} === Notes === {{Footnote help}} {{Reflist}} === See Also === *
